brand.title: Tax Rookie | Invoice Verify
brand.titleZh: 報稅菜鳥｜發票驗算工具
brand.subtitle: Invoice verification for accountants

header.tip: Enter or paste data in Net, Tax, or Total columns. Other columns are calculated automatically.
header.pasteFailed: Unable to read clipboard. Paste directly into the grid with Ctrl+V.

import.title: Import Excel
import.selectFileDesc: Supports .xlsx and .xls. Files are processed locally in your browser only.
import.mappingDesc: Map net, tax, and gross columns. Theoretical columns are calculated and cannot be imported.

errors.readFailed: Unable to read the Excel file. Please use .xlsx or .xls.
errors.selectField: Please specify at least one field.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.message: Please share feedback using this form:

footer.privacy: All data is processed locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded or stored.
footer.liveHint: Values calculate instantly. Soft row colors show status (green / orange / red).

empty.hint: Tap Net, Tax, or Total to enter values. Row colors: light green = match, light orange = within tolerance, light red = out of tolerance.
empty.mobileScrollHint: ← Swipe for Expected Net / Expected Tax / Expected Total / Diff / Issue →  Out-of-tolerance shows e.g. Net>Expected Net
